record.text:
📯
The Peony Has Opened

Overnight, without ceremony or audience, the peony opened anyway, apparently unbothered by the inconvenient hour and entirely uninterested in being admired for it.

#AIイラスト #AiArt #SynthArt #Midjourney8.1

images.alt: Three deep red peonies against a dark teal background: one fully open with a golden stamen center and pale pistils, one partially open, and one still budding. Blue-green leaves frame the stems below.
Three deep red peonies against a dark teal background: one fully open with a golden stamen center and pale pistils, one partially open, and one still budding. Blue-green leaves frame the stems below.

record.text:
📯
Shrine Beneath the Red Moon

Drawn to a door that was never locked, standing before a light that needed no invitation -- he has arrived, as usual, exactly on time for nothing in particular.

#AIイラスト #AiArt #SynthArt #Midjourney8.1

images.alt: A white-robed figure stands on a path before a weathered domed shrine with an arched doorway and glowing windows. A massive red moon rises behind a slender minaret. Tall cypress trees and a broad ancient tree flank the building, with misty water and rocky spires visible in the blue background.

コスプレ乱交PV #36 (予告)
次はウエディングドレスになります。内部的には「#34 サマードレス」「#35 ナース」に続く「白いドレス三部作」の完結編になります

元々#34は違うコスだったのですが、BGMの歌詞が「白いドレス」から始まってしまったため方向転換したと言う経緯でした。当時はSunoを月額で使っていて「BGMをストックしてサブスク費を節約しよう」とセコいことを考えての三部作だったのですが、その後で間違ってSunoを年間契約してしまって毎回BGMを作ることになって当初の経緯が有耶無耶になりながらもどうにか完走できたと言う経緯です(めっさ早口)
